ogtitle: Change the preferred name for your account
content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat   Business   Online banking   NAB Connect online banking   NAB Connect help   Admin and Forms   Self-service for Administrators   Change the preferred name for your account   Change the preferred name for your account   Learn how to make a nickname for your accounts, cards, or merchant facilities in NAB Connect.   Steps for changing your account name   Make sure you’re logged into NAB Connect as an Administrator to get started   From the Admin menu, select ‘Accounts’.  Select the account, card or merchant facility you want to edit the nickname for.   Select Edit preferred name.   In the Account preferred name field, type your new preferred name.  Select Save. This new nickname will display to all users who have access to the account via this NAB Connect facility.   Related guides  See some of our other guides to help you get the most out of NAB Connect.  Add a new account under a different business   Use our guide to add a new account under a different business or relate another business entity in NAB Connect.  Change who can access an account   Use our guide to change who can access an account in NAB Connect.  Add a new service   Use our guide to add a new service in NAB Connect.  Contact us for NAB Connect enquiries  Call us   Monday to Friday, 7:30am to 8:00pm (AEST/AEDT)  Saturday, 9:00am to 2:00pm (AEST/AEDT)  Within Australia: 1300 888 413  Overseas: +61 3 8641 9930  Important information  This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.  Apologies but the Important Information section you are trying to view is not displaying properly at the moment. Please refresh the page or try again later.
